touches.ai_summary: LinkedIn connection request sent to Alex Phillips with personalized note about CRM automation challenges for fintech teams. No response received.
Brief cold call with Alex Phillips. Rep introduced value prop for CRM automation. Alex expressed initial interest and agreed to follow-up email with more details.

questions_asked.question: Are you currently using any CRM automation tools?
questions_asked.answer: We're using some basic workflows in our current CRM but nothing sophisticated.

questions_asked.question: What makes your solution different from built-in automation?
questions_asked.answer: We offer unlimited automation workflows with AI-powered triggers and cross-platform integrations that go beyond standard CRM capabilities.

next_steps: Send detailed email with case studies

touches.ai_summary: Follow-up email sent with fintech-specific case studies and ROI calculator. Alex responded positively, asking about implementation timeline and requesting a technical demo.

questions_asked.question: How long does implementation typically take for a team our size?
questions_asked.answer: For 11 seats, typically 2-3 weeks including training and custom workflow setup.

next_steps: Schedule technical evaluation for next week

touches.ai_summary: Technical evaluation call with Alex Phillips walking through automation workflows, API integrations, and compliance features. Alex showed strong interest in unlimited automation tier and discussed specific use cases for their CS team. No executive participation noted.

questions_asked.question: Can we integrate with our existing fintech compliance tools?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, we have pre-built connectors for major compliance platforms and a flexible API for custom integrations.

questions_asked.question: What kind of reporting does the platform provide for automation performance?
questions_asked.answer: Real-time dashboards with automation success rates, time saved metrics, and customizable reports for leadership.

questions_asked.question: Who else on your team should we involve in the evaluation process?
questions_asked.answer: I'll need to loop in our operations lead eventually, but I can drive this evaluation for now.

objections: Need to see more detail on data security and SOC 2 compliance before moving forward
next_steps: Send SOC 2 documentation and security white paper

touches.ai_summary: Executive meeting rescheduled from original time. When held, only Alex Phillips attended (no executive present). Discussed business case, ROI projections for 11 seats, and implementation plan. Alex positioned this as final approval call but acknowledged needing to brief leadership offline.

questions_asked.question: Will we have a chance to present directly to your executive team?
questions_asked.answer: Our CEO is pretty hands-off on vendor decisions at this level. I'll brief them on what we discussed.

questions_asked.question: What's your best pricing for the unlimited automation tier?
questions_asked.answer: Standard pricing is $11,600 for 11 seats, but I can work with my manager on commercial terms.

questions_asked.question: What's your timeline for making a decision?
questions_asked.answer: We'd like to have something in place by end of quarter, so within the next few weeks.

objections: The list price feels high for our team size—we'd need to see more aggressive pricing to move forward
next_steps: Prepare formal proposal with discounted pricing
Schedule final pricing call to review terms

touches.ai_summary: Pricing negotiation call with Alex. Presented discounted proposal at $8,200 ACV (29% discount) for 11 seats on unlimited automation tier. Alex pressed for additional concessions but ultimately agreed to terms. No other stakeholders joined. Contract to be sent for signature.

questions_asked.question: Can we get a shorter commitment term than 12 months?
questions_asked.answer: Our standard contracts are annual, but we can include a satisfaction guarantee for the first 90 days.

questions_asked.question: Is implementation support included at this price point?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, full implementation support and training for all 11 users is included.

questions_asked.question: Are you comfortable moving forward with the contract this week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I can review and sign by Friday if you send it over today.

next_steps: Schedule kickoff call for following week
